creator: rfgrimm@gmail.com
text: The www/rubygem-passenger port should no longer depend on devel/rubygem-fastthread or devel/rubygem-daemon_controller.  The passenger gem removed the fastthread dependency in version 4.0 and the daemon_controller dependency in version 5.0.  https://rubygems.org/gems/passenger can be used to see the current dependencies.
